column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Putting a hand on someone's shoulder softly" | TEXT="陰ながら応援しております" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Raising a fist inside her sleeve in support" | TEXT="きっと大丈夫です" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling with absolute confidence and trust" | TEXT="信じておりますわ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Waving a banner with motivational kanji" | TEXT="全力で攻めなさい" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Preparing a recovery meal with energy" | TEXT="元気を出しなさいな" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at someone with encouraging eyes" | TEXT="まだ道は続いております" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Stamping her foot firmly on the ground" | TEXT="踏ん張りどころですわ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a protective charm (omamori)" | TEXT="ご加護がありますよう" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Standing in the wind, cheering silently" | TEXT="風が味方しております"
